languages.text: {n}Дознаватель слегка прищуривается, мрачно глядя на врата{/n}: "Едва ли то, что скрывают эти врата, понравится мне... или, если уж на то пошло, вам".
{n}Heinrix's eyes narrow as he stares at the gate in grim contemplation{/n}: "What lies beyond this gate is unlikely to please me... or you, for that matter."
languages.original_text: {n}Дознаватель слегка прищуривается, мрачно глядя на врата{/n}: "Едва ли то, что скрывают эти врата, понравится мне... или, если уж на то пошло, вам".

{n}Heinrix's eyes narrow as he stares at the gate in grim contemplation{/n}: "What lies beyond this gate is unlikely to please me... or you, for that matter."

languages.text: {n}ヘインリクスは門をじっと見つめ、険しい表情で言った。{/n}「この門の向こうには、私やあなたにとって好ましくないものがあるだろう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix's eyes narrow as he stares at the gate in grim contemplation{/n}: "What lies beyond this gate is unlikely to please me... or you, for that matter."

traits.locale_text: ヘインリクスは門をじっと見つめ、険しい表情で言った。「この門の向こうには、私やあなたにとって好ましくないものがあるだろう。」

languages.text: {n}Heinrix entrecierra los ojos y mira la puerta, meditabundo.{/n} «Tengo la impresión de que lo que hay al otro lado de esa puerta no me va a gustar nada... y a usted tampoco».
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix's eyes narrow as he stares at the gate in grim contemplation{/n}: "What lies beyond this gate is unlikely to please me... or you, for that matter."

traits.locale_text: {n}Heinrix entrecierra los ojos y mira la puerta, meditabundo.{/n} «Tengo la impresión de que lo que hay al otro lado de esa puerta no me va a gustar nada... y a usted tampoco».

languages.text: {n}Heinrix runzelt die Stirn, während er in missmutiger Kontemplation auf das Tor starrt:{/n} "Was hinter diesem Tor liegt, wird mich wohl kaum erfreuen ... oder Euch, wo wir schon dabei sind."
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix's eyes narrow as he stares at the gate in grim contemplation{/n}: "What lies beyond this gate is unlikely to please me... or you, for that matter."

traits.locale_text: {n}Heinrix runzelt die Stirn, während er in missmutiger Kontemplation auf das Tor starrt:{/n} "Was hinter diesem Tor liegt, wird mich wohl kaum erfreuen ... oder Euch, wo wir schon dabei sind."

languages.text: {n}Heinrix plisse les yeux en examinant le portail, puis déclare d'un ton sombre :{/n} « Ce qui se cache derrière ce portail risque de me déplaire fortement... et à vous aussi. »
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix's eyes narrow as he stares at the gate in grim contemplation{/n}: "What lies beyond this gate is unlikely to please me... or you, for that matter."

traits.locale_text: {n}Heinrix plisse les yeux en examinant le portail, puis déclare d'un ton sombre :{/n} « Ce qui se cache derrière ce portail risque de me déplaire fortement... et à vous aussi. »

languages.text: {n}海因里希眯起双眼，阴沉地审视着这扇大门。{/n}“这扇门后的东西，恐怕不会让你我感到愉悦。”
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix's eyes narrow as he stares at the gate in grim contemplation{/n}: "What lies beyond this gate is unlikely to please me... or you, for that matter."

traits.locale_text: {n}海因里希眯起双眼，阴沉地审视着这扇大门。{/n}“这扇门后的东西，恐怕不会让你我感到愉悦。”

languages.text: {n}Gözlerini kısan Heinrix, kapıya kasvetli bir tefekkürle bakıyor.{/n} "Bu kapının ardında yatan şeyin beni memnun etmesi pek olası değil... Hatta sizi de."
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix's eyes narrow as he stares at the gate in grim contemplation{/n}: "What lies beyond this gate is unlikely to please me... or you, for that matter."
